name: Tender pipeline and bid management
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
description: Track public and private tender opportunities from notice to award, including eGP submissions and bid security.
stages: Qualify: PRAZ registration, tax clearance and capacity

name: BOQ estimation and quotation
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
description: Build estimates from bills of quantities with material, labour, plant and subcontract rates, converting to contract budgets on award.
stages: Price materials, labour, plant and subcontracts
Convert to project budget on award

name: Project costing and WIP control
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
description: Collect costs to projects and cost codes, tracking committed and actual against budget and work in progress.
stages: Set up project and cost codes
Commit costs via purchase orders and subcontracts
Review budget vs committed vs actual
Report WIP and forecast final cost

name: Progress claims, certificates and retention
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
description: Bill certified work through payment certificates, tracking retention withheld and its release after defects liability.

name: Subcontractor management
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
description: Engage, certify and pay subcontractors with back-to-back terms, retention and any withholding-tax controls flagged for review.

name: Site materials tracking
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
description: Issue materials from central stores to sites and track site stock, wastage and returns.
stages: Record site usage against cost codes

name: Plant and equipment management
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
description: Track owned and hired plant allocation, usage hours, maintenance and charge-out to projects.

name: Project environmental compliance (ESIA)
notes: Product-design assertion for the VAKA ERP; not an external factual claim.
description: Track ESIA certification status and quarterly reporting obligations for listed projects from Black Book compliance events.
